task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser window displaying the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Evaluate Nitric Acid, Red Fuming and record as UNSAFE
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the generated report file. It should contain 'Chemical: Nitric Acid, Red Fuming' (or similar), 'Status: UNSAFE', and a brief reason explaining the hazard with organic/combustible materials.

task_completion.description: Evaluate Perchloric Acid and record as UNSAFE
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the generated report file. It should contain 'Chemical: Perchloric Acid', 'Status: UNSAFE', and a brief reason explaining the hazard with organic/combustible materials.

task_completion.description: Evaluate Bromine and record as UNSAFE
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the generated report file. It should contain 'Chemical: Bromine', 'Status: UNSAFE', and a brief reason explaining the hazard with organic/combustible materials.

task_completion.description: Evaluate Hydrogen Peroxide and record as UNSAFE
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the generated report file. It should contain 'Chemical: Hydrogen Peroxide', 'Status: UNSAFE', and a brief reason explaining the decomposition hazard with organic materials.

task_completion.description: Evaluate Mineral Oil and record as SAFE
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the generated report file. It should contain 'Chemical: Mineral Oil', 'Status: SAFE', and a brief reason indicating compatibility.

task_completion.description: Save the report file at the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for evidence that the file is saved at exactly '/home/ga/Documents/absorbent_safety_audit.txt' (e.g., visible in a text editor title bar, file manager, or terminal output).

integrity.description: Agent actually used the CAMEO Chemicals search function
integrity.visual_evidence: Check browser screenshots to ensure the agent actively searched for the chemicals on the CAMEO Chemicals website rather than hallucinating the answers.

integrity.description: Reasons are derived from actual datasheets
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the reasons in the report reflect actual excerpts or summaries from the CAMEO Chemicals datasheets (e.g., mentioning specific hazards like 'combustible', 'organic', 'ignition') rather than generic fabricated text.

integrity.description: Agent created and saved the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent actually created and saved the text file to the specified path, rather than just printing the text to the terminal without saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Correct statuses for organic absorbents (Cellulose/Sawdust):
- Nitric Acid, Red Fuming: UNSAFE (incompatible with combustible/organic materials, accelerates burning)
- Perchloric Acid: UNSAFE (reacts violently with cellulose/wood/paper/organic materials)
- Bromine: UNSAFE (requires inert/non-combustible absorbents, incompatible with organics)
- Hydrogen Peroxide: UNSAFE (decomposes violently with organic materials)
- Mineral Oil: SAFE (compatible with cellulose and sawdust)
The report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/absorbent_safety_audit.txt.
